notes: core uses hijriMonth:7, hijriDay:1 — same type:hijri engine as ramadan/islamic-new-year, no manual date math needed.

Facts (Rajab = 7th hijri month, one of 4 sacred months, no distinct worship beyond general sanctity, 27 Rajab linked to Isra/Miraj as a historical not shar'i-mandated date) verified against islamweb.net/binbaz.org.sa fatwa conventions already used elsewhere in the catalog (see islamic-new-year, isra-miraj).
Differentiation angle: explicitly frames Rajab as the start of the two-month runway to Ramadan (Rajab → Shaban → Ramadan), reciprocally linked to shaban-start and ramadan.
Written in direct address (أنت) from the first draft per the house style rule.
